title: Noah Lucas homepage v040 product management hero
changeSummary: Replaces the hero phrase with a concise frontier-technology product statement.
Absorbs the former Archetype section into the hero as Product Management.
Densifies Product Management into Methods, Breadth, and Depth.
Defines Methods as First principles, Systems thinking, and Customer obsession.
Removes the Employer Logos and Experience section labels while preserving the logos and work cards.
Keeps the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local source validation plus public staging browser check after GitHub Pages deployment.
